message:
feat(stream): add chain/filter/merge stream combinators and timeout race tests

Stream combinators:
- stream/chain.rs: Add tests for empty-first chain, empty-second chain,
  both-empty, single-element streams, and large stream chaining.
- stream/filter.rs: Add FilterStream combinator tests for predicate-based
  stream filtering with Cx awareness, including filter-all, filter-none,
  stateful predicates, and type-erased filter chains.
- stream/merge.rs: Add MergeStream combinator tests for interleaved
  polling of two streams, including unequal lengths, one-empty, both-empty,
  and ordering fairness verification.

Combinator:
- combinator/timeout.rs: Add timeout-race interaction tests covering
  complete-before-deadline, deadline-fires-first, exact deadline match,
  zero-duration timeout, max-duration timeout, cancelled-before-deadline,
  error-before-deadline, nested timeout (inner tighter wins), and
  sequential timeout reuse patterns.

Sync:
- sync/notify.rs: Fix rustfmt formatting in entries-bounded assertion.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
